articles.author: Safiyah Riddle
articles.title: US on track to have historically low number of homicides in 2026, report says - AP News
articles.description: A new report from the Council on Criminal Justice shows an 18% decrease in the homicide rate across 30 American cities from 2025 compared to the same period in 2026. This trend could lead to the lowest annual homicide rate in over a century. The report releas…
articles.content: LOS ANGELES (AP) Data collected from 30 American cities showed an 18% decrease in the homicide rate from 2025 compared to the same period in 2026, translating to about 215 fewer homicides this year, … [+4594 chars]
